steps.note: Step 1: Click the casepilot project name on its project card
Step 2: Wait for the cases table to appear
Step 3: Click the case name link "cases-list" in the table
Step 4: Wait for the case detail page with the cases-list heading
Step 5: Scroll to the Run history section
Expectation 1: Run history table has a Run column
Expectation 1: Run history table has a Mode column
Expectation 1: Run history table has a Provider column
Expectation 1: Run history table has a Status column
Expectation 1: Run history table has a Verdict column
Expectation 1: Run history table has a Duration column
Expectation 1: Run history table has a Started column

steps.selector: #root > div > main > div > div > section:nth-of-type(3) > table > tbody > tr:nth-of-type(1) > td:nth-of-type(1) > code
steps.note: Expectation 2: First row shows a short run id in a code element

steps.selector: #root > div > main > div > div > section:nth-of-type(3) > table > tbody > tr:nth-of-type(1) > td:nth-of-type(2) > span
steps.note: Expectation 2: First row shows a mode badge

steps.selector: #root > div > main > div > div > section:nth-of-type(3) > table > tbody > tr:nth-of-type(1) > td:nth-of-type(5) > span
steps.note: Expectation 2: First row shows a verdict badge

steps.selector: #root > div > main > div > div > section:nth-of-type(3) > table > tbody > tr:nth-of-type(1)
steps.note: Step 6: Click the first row in the run history table
Expectation 3: Run detail page has a "case cases-list" link back to the case
